cmd_load_failed: Couldn’t load the mesh — try reopening.
route_overview_description: Your local Domia mesh at a glance.
route_fleet_description: Every Domia on this property — see them as cards, on the map, or in a table.
route_nodes_description: Each physical Domia node and the identities it hosts.
route_broadcast_description: Announce to your rooms or open an intercom between them.
route_templates_description: Reusable full configurations. Build one, then apply it to any Domia in seconds.
route_conversations_description: Every interaction across the mesh — transcripts, replies, audio and grading.
route_chat_description: Talk to any Domia — text or voice, any mode, no mic needed. Every exchange is a real interaction.
route_emotions_description: Pick a Domia to see its mood right now and how it shifts as it talks with you.
route_memories_description: What each Domia — and the mesh — remembers about you.
route_memories_description_one: 1 fact learned across the mesh — what each Domia remembers about you.
route_memories_description_many: {count} facts learned across the mesh — what each Domia remembers about you.
route_analytics_description: Time to first audio, per-stage latency, model performance and the labeled eval corpus.
route_settings_description: Console preferences, sync status and local data.
settings_language_help: Console display language. English is the default.
settings_appearance_help: Theme for the console. System follows your OS preference.
settings_live_refresh_help: How often live views (Overview, Domias, Conversations in live mode) poll for fresh data.
domia_kb_desc: Real facts about this deployment (floor, hours, nearby places). Domia answers from these offline — no tools or internet.
domia_kb_empty: No knowledge yet. Add facts Domia should know about its place and role.
domia_kb_content_placeholder: Checkout is at 11 AM. Late checkout until 2 PM at the front desk.
config_section_identity_desc: This Domia's name on the network — how it shows up everywhere in the console.
config_section_character_desc: Who this Domia is — character and the way it talks.
config_section_emotion_desc: Baseline mood it starts each conversation from. Each axis runs −1 to 1 — drag the radar or use the sliders.
config_section_llm_desc: The language model that thinks and replies.
config_section_stt_desc: Speech-to-text — how it transcribes what it hears.
config_section_wakeword_desc: Wake word, microphone capture and voice activity.
config_section_playback_desc: How synthesized audio is played back.
config_section_capabilities_desc: Which parts of the pipeline this Domia runs locally.
config_section_modules_desc: Memory, emotion, identity and other cognitive modules.
config_section_skills_desc: Connect skill providers so this Domia can take real actions and fetch information. The first protocol is MCP (Model Context Protocol) — Home Assistant, a calendar, a filesystem, your own. Enable the Skills toggle in Behavior for the tools to be used.
config_section_mqtt_desc: Local MQTT broker for discovery and heartbeat.
config_section_advanced_desc: Session, memory window and concurrency tuning.
config_section_health_desc: Configured engines vs what is actually installed.
config_section_models_desc: Install and inspect models for every stage.
config_hint_domia_name: A human name for this device, e.g. Kitchen or Living Room.
config_hint_character_name: How the Domia refers to itself.
config_hint_voice: Voice within the model, e.g. af_heart.
config_hint_first_flush_cap: Flush the first phrase after this long even if short. 0 = off.
config_hint_pipeline_depth: Sentences buffered between LLM and TTS.
config_hint_eager_synthesis: Upcoming sentences synthesized while the current one plays. 0 = lazy.
config_hint_server_url: Where the model server runs. Ollama host (http://localhost:11434) or an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (http://localhost:8080/v1 for llama.cpp / LM Studio / vLLM, or a cloud URL).
config_hint_api_key: Only for hosted/cloud OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Leave empty for local servers.
config_hint_reflection_model: Smaller model for off-hot-path reflection (emotions/facts) — keeps the main model's prompt cache warm. Empty = same model.
config_hint_skills_prompt_mode: When skills are on: lean = most reliable tool-calling, full = richest persona (needs a stronger model), compact = balanced.
config_hint_skills_routing: intent-gate runs a tiny model first so chit-chat keeps full persona and only real commands hit the tools; always-agent sends every turn through the tool path.
config_hint_intent_model: Small model for the intent gate (default llama3.2:3b). Only used when routing is intent-gate.
config_hint_agent_max_steps: Max tool-call iterations per turn before the agent gives up.
config_hint_min_silence: Silero's internal debounce — sustained silence before speech is considered over. Adds up with End of speech.
config_hint_end_of_speech: Extra confirmation AFTER Min silence elapses. Effective wait = Min silence + this — the most felt latency knob.
config_hint_follow_up_window: After replying, keep listening this long for a follow-up — no wake word needed. 0 turns it off.
config_hint_barge_in: Saying the wake word while it talks cuts the reply and listens.
config_hint_speculative_commit: Start thinking after this much raw silence, before end-of-speech confirms — cancelled silently if you keep talking. 0 turns it off.
config_hint_follow_up_lead_pad: Audio kept from just before follow-up speech was detected, so the first syllable isn't clipped.
config_hint_feedback_sounds: Master switch for non-verbal cues (only on live mic turns).
config_hint_skills_tools: Let this Domia call tools from connected skill providers (see the Skills section).
config_hint_yield_to_voice: Abort and requeue reflection when a voice request arrives.
config_hint_warmup_on_boot: Preload STT/LLM/TTS after startup so the first turn is hot.
config_hint_peer_stale_after: Skip delegation targets not heard from in this window.
config_archetype_standalone_desc: Everything local — wake word, mic, STT, LLM, TTS and playback.
config_archetype_thin_client_desc: Wake word + audio only; delegates STT/LLM/TTS to a hub.
config_archetype_inference_hub_desc: Brain only — STT, LLM, TTS and intents, no mic or speaker.
config_template_editing_copy: Editing a copy — nothing is applied to a live Domia
config_skill_none: No skill providers yet. Add one to give this Domia tools — Home Assistant, a calendar, a filesystem, or any MCP server.
config_skill_token_hint: Write-only — leave blank to keep the current one.
config_skill_headers_hint: Write-only — leave blank to keep current.
config_skill_advanced_hint_b: limits which params each tool shows the model (e.g. only
config_preset_home_assistant_desc: Control devices and read live state over MCP. Aliases, core tools and finalize are filled automatically.
config_preset_generic_mcp_desc: A plain MCP endpoint. Set the URL and any auth, then tweak the descriptor if needed.
config_skill_preset_hint: Home Assistant fills aliases, core tools and finalize automatically — you usually only need the URL and token.
models_custom_hint: Any model, no catalog edit. Spec:
models_no_catalog: No catalog entries for this stage.
chat_empty_hint: Type, toggle “Speak replies”, or upload a WAV to test any flow.
chat_live_channel_note: This is a live channel — every exchange is a real interaction, logged and visible in Conversations.
chat_placeholder_demo: Chat needs a live mesh — disabled in this read-only demo
chat_placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
conv_load_error: Couldn't load conversations — check the console connection.
broadcast_recent_empty: Announcements you send show up here.
broadcast_to_mesh_desc: Send text or an audio clip. Targets play it back as the original recording or re-spoken in each Domia's own voice.
broadcast_intercom_desc: Open a live voice link between two rooms on the same node.
broadcast_intercom_needs: Intercom needs a node hosting two or more intercom-capable rooms.
analytics_on_device_sub: run on the origin device vs delegated
analytics_waterfall_note_c: before the full {sum} pipeline finishes, thanks to per-sentence LLM→TTS pipelining.
templates_empty: No templates yet. Create one to get started.
err_domia_unreachable: This Domia has no reachable address
err_node_unreachable: This node has no reachable address
err_target_unreachable: Target node has no reachable address
err_no_archived_audio: No input audio archived for voice re-run
err_system_template_readonly: System templates are read-only — clone instead
err_announce_empty: Type a message or record a clip
toast_install_status_unavailable_desc: Lost contact with the node — check it directly.
toast_template_saved_desc: Apply it to any Domia from Templates.
toast_identity_created_desc: {name} is now hosted live — no restart needed.
toast_identity_removed_desc: {name} was soft-disabled — its history and config are kept. You can re-add it later.
toast_wake_saved_reconnect: Wake word saved — applies on reconnect
toast_device_not_responding_desc: Bound, but it didn't connect. Check the encryption key and that the device is on the network.
toast_satellite_unbound_desc: Connection dropped live — no restart needed.
toast_intercom_no_endpoint: No reachable audio endpoint in the target room
dlg_avatar_desc: Pick a character or upload your own image. Saved instantly — no restart.
dlg_restart_desc: The Domia process restarts and reloads its configuration from the database. It is briefly unavailable while it comes back.
dlg_save_template_desc: Captures this Domia's full configuration — persona, voice, engines, models, capabilities and tuning — minus device identity and network. Apply it to any Domia later.
dlg_add_identity_desc: Creates a new neutral identity hosted on this node. It comes online live — other identities stay up — then you can configure it.
dlg_remove_identity_desc: This soft-disables the identity on this node — its history and configuration are kept, and it stops responding live (no restart, other identities stay up). You can re-add it later.
dlg_bind_desc: Assign this device to a room. Paste the device's API encryption key (from its ESPHome setup). It connects live.
sat_none_found: No Satellites devices found on the network.
sat_view_desc: Hardware endpoints connected to your Domia fleet.
sat_empty_hint: Discover and bind satellites from a Domia's page.
sat_select_prompt: Select a satellite to see details.
conv_incomplete_aborted_detail: It was interrupted — a barge-in or a newer turn started on this Domia (one conversation runs at a time), or it was cancelled. The captured audio is kept, but the turn did not complete, so some later stages (transcript, reply, or audio) may be missing.
conv_incomplete_failed_detail: The pipeline hit an error before producing a reply.
conv_incomplete_empty_stt_detail: Speech-to-text produced no text — likely silence, a very short utterance, or an audio issue. Without a transcript the LLM and TTS stages don't run.
conv_incomplete_no_reply_detail: The model didn't return a response for this turn.
grade_correction_placeholder: Write the response the Domia should have given…
fleet_load_failed: Couldn't load the fleet — check the console connection.
mem_load_failed: Couldn't load memories — check the console connection.
mem_empty_hint: No facts learned yet. They appear as Domias remember things about you.
broadcast_text_placeholder: Type a message, or record audio with the mic…
broadcast_domia_voice_desc: Each target re-speaks it in its own voice.
broadcast_original_desc_record: Record a clip to play it.
tpl_new_desc_scratch: Starting from a Domia's initial factory defaults. Edit anything, then save.
tpl_new_desc_domia_clone: Editing a copy of {name}. Device identity and network are excluded automatically.
tpl_new_desc_default: Build a portable configuration once, then apply it to any Domia.
tpl_new_start_scratch_hint: A Domia's initial factory defaults — no Domia required.
tpl_new_clone_domia: Or clone a Domia (offline ones use their last reported config)
tpl_new_gone: That template is no longer available.
tpl_new_config_load_failed: Could not load that Domia's configuration.
conv_rerun_demo_note: Re-running needs a live mesh — disabled in this read-only demo.
conv_rerun_transcript_note: Cross-node voice re-run uses the transcript re-spoken (approximation).
conv_new_interaction_note: New interaction {id} — appears in Conversations after the next sync.
shell_demo_banner: You are browsing real pipeline data captured from a live 5-Domia home mesh — latencies, delegation journeys, memories and emotions are genuine. Voices are synthetic. The demo is read-only.
shell_error_desc: An unexpected error occurred while loading this view.
shell_not_found_desc: This page may have moved or never existed. Let’s get you back to the fleet.
tpl_edit_desc: Edit this template's configuration and save your changes.
config_desc_param_allow_supersedes: Supersedes toolParamAllow in the advanced config above.
conv_timeline_empty: No turn events recorded for this interaction.
